name: Chhotelal Kharwar
profileSummary: Chhotelal Kharwar is a member of the Samajwadi Party. He won the 2014 Indian general elections from the Robertsganj constituency on a BJP ticket. He was a National Council member of the Bharatiya Janata Party from Sonbhadra. He recontested and won again in Robertsganj in the 2024 Indian general elections on a Samajwadi Party ticket.
